title: Luna 6 Lane Departure Collisions得分：单车与Car/PTW场景
content: Lane Departure Collisions满分20。1V得14.4810，1V2R/1V3-5R/5V5R12Uss均为19.2310。Single vehicle部分：Driver Acceptance 5/5、Lane Departure 4.625/5，各配置一致。Car & PTW部分：ELK Car-to-Car Oncoming 2.4280/2.5、Car-to-Motorcyclist Oncoming 2.4280/2.5，各配置一致；Overtaking场景在1V为0分，增加雷达后Car-to-Car Overtaking与Car-to-Motorcyclist Overtaking均提升至2.3750/2.5。
